title: Changelog Automation
description: Automated changelog generation with smart categorization and audience-aware formatting.
contentMarkdown:
# Changelog Automation

Never write a changelog by hand again.

## Features

*   Keep-a-changelog format compliance
*   Audience-aware: developer vs. end-user changelogs
*   Automatic PR labeling and categorization
*   RSS feed generation for changelog updates
*   Slack and Teams notifications on new releases

## Pricing

$19/mo starter

$49/mo professional

title: Release Notes Generator
description: Automatically generate release notes from git commits, PRs, and issues with AI-powered summarization.
contentMarkdown:
# Release Notes Generator

Transform your git history into beautiful, human-readable release notes.

## Features

*   AI-powered commit summarization using Claude
*   Automatic categorization: features, fixes, breaking changes
*   GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket integration
*   Customizable templates with Markdown and HTML output
*   Semantic versioning suggestions based on change analysis
*   Multi-repo changelog aggregation

## Pricing

Free for open source

$29/mo for teams

$99/mo for enterprise

## Integrations

Works with GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, CircleCI, and any CI/CD pipeline.

[Integration Guide](/docs/integration-guide)

> "ReleaseBot cut our release documentation time by 90%. Our team now ships with confidence."

— Sarah Chen, VP Engineering at TechCorp

title: Version Tracker
description: Track versions across all your services, libraries, and deployments in one dashboard.
contentMarkdown:
# Version Tracker

One dashboard for every version across your stack.

## Features

*   Real-time version monitoring across microservices
*   Drift detection between environments (dev/staging/prod)
*   Dependency tree visualization
*   Automated compatibility matrix generation
*   SLA compliance tracking for version currency

## Pricing

$39/mo per team

$149/mo enterprise with SSO
contentHtml:
Home Products

  • Dependency tree visualization

title: Dependency Monitor
description: Monitor dependency updates, security vulnerabilities, and license compliance across your repositories.
contentMarkdown:
# Dependency Monitor

Stay ahead of vulnerabilities and breaking changes.

## Features

*   CVE monitoring with severity scoring
*   License compliance checking (MIT, Apache, GPL detection)
*   Automated PR creation for dependency updates
*   Breaking change impact analysis
*   SBOM generation (CycloneDX, SPDX formats)

## Pricing

Free for up to 5 repos

$59/mo unlimited repos
contentHtml:
Home Products

Dependency Monitor

Stay ahead of vulnerabilities and breaking changes.

Features

  • CVE monitoring with severity scoring
  • License compliance checking (MIT, Apache, GPL detection)
  • Automated PR creation for dependency updates
  • Breaking change impact analysis
  • SBOM generation (CycloneDX, SPDX formats)

Pricing

Free for up to 5 repos
$59/mo unlimited repos

title: API Versioning
description: Manage API versions, deprecation schedules, and migration guides with automated tooling.
contentMarkdown:
# API Versioning

Evolve your APIs without breaking consumers.

## Features

*   OpenAPI spec diff and breaking change detection
*   Automated deprecation notice generation
*   Consumer-aware sunset scheduling
*   Migration guide generation from API diffs
*   Version analytics: adoption curves per endpoint

## Pricing

$79/mo per API

$299/mo unlimited APIs
contentHtml:
Home Products

API Versioning

Evolve your APIs without breaking consumers.

Features

  • OpenAPI spec diff and breaking change detection
  • Automated deprecation notice generation
  • Consumer-aware sunset scheduling
  • Migration guide generation from API diffs
  • Version analytics: adoption curves per endpoint

Pricing

$79/mo per API
$299/mo unlimited APIs

title: Our Customers
description: See how leading companies use Anthropic's Claude to transform their businesses.
contentMarkdown:
# Our Customers

Organizations building the future with Claude

## [Notion](/customers/notion)

Technology / Productivity

Notion integrated Claude to power their AI writing assistant, enabling millions of users to draft, summarize, and brainstorm directly within their workspace. Result: 3x increase in AI feature adoption.

*   3x AI feature adoption
*   40% reduction in content creation time
*   2M+ daily AI interactions

## [Bridgewater Associates](/customers/bridgewater)

Finance / Investment

Bridgewater uses Claude for research synthesis, analyzing thousands of economic reports and market data sources to surface actionable investment insights.

*   60% faster research cycles
*   10,000+ documents analyzed daily
*   85% analyst satisfaction score

## [Clio](/customers/clio)

Legal Technology

Clio's legal practice management platform leverages Claude for document review, contract analysis, and case summarization, reducing billable hours spent on routine tasks.

*   70% reduction in document review time
*   50,000+ contracts analyzed
*   99.2% accuracy on extraction tasks

## [Elation Health](/customers/elation-health)

Healthcare / EHR

Elation Health uses Claude to assist physicians with clinical documentation, reducing administrative burden and improving patient interaction time.

*   45% less time on documentation
*   30% more patient face time
*   15,000+ clinicians supported

## [Coursera](/customers/coursera)

Education / EdTech

Coursera integrated Claude as an AI tutor providing personalized explanations, practice problems, and adaptive learning paths for over 100 million learners worldwide.

*   25% improvement in course completion rates
*   100M+ learners with AI access
*   4.8/5 student satisfaction

## [Sourcegraph](/customers/sourcegraph)

Developer Tools

Sourcegraph's Cody AI assistant uses Claude for code understanding, generation, and refactoring across massive enterprise codebases with millions of lines of code.

*   35% developer productivity increase
*   500M+ lines of code indexed
*   90% code suggestion acceptance rate

## Ready to build with Claude?

Join hundreds of organizations transforming their workflows with AI.

[Contact Sales](/contact) [Start Building](https://console.anthropic.com)
